summary: Completed frontend testing of mobile responsiveness fix for kiosk payment screens. All 4 screens (KioskTenantOverview, KioskPaymentSelect, KioskPaymentConfirm, PaymentConfirm) now correctly use flex-col on mobile (375px) and md:flex-row on desktop (1920px). No horizontal overflow detected on any screen.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile responsiveness fix verified. All kiosk payment screens stack vertically on mobile (375px) and display side-by-side on desktop (1920px). Bottom navigation bar does not overlap content.

tests_executed.details: flex-col applied on mobile, flexDirection: column, no horizontal overflow
md:flex-row applied on desktop, flexDirection: row, 2-column layout preserved
Payment types panel + keypad stack vertically, no horizontal overflow
2-column layout with payment types on left, keypad on right
Payment method cards (Mope, Uni5Pay) stack vertically, no horizontal overflow
Payment method cards (Contant, Mope, Uni5Pay, Pinpas) displayed side-by-side
bodyScrollWidth equals bodyClientWidth (375px) on all mobile screens

mocked_apis.note: Mope and Uni5Pay payment gateways are MOCKED
